name: agon-orchestrator
description: Expose Agon orchestration modes to Codex through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Run Agon forge, brainstorm, tribunal, campfire, pipeline, and review from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to an existing Agon-AI checkout so Codex can invoke Agon orchestration workflows through MCP while Agon manages the configured engines.
defaultPrompt: Use Agon forge to have engines compete on this implementation.
Use Agon brainstorm to compare approaches.
Use Agon tribunal to stress-test this design.
